title: Finland’s Kone to buy German rival TK Elevator in blockbuster $34.4 billion deal
summary_full: The combination would create the world’s largest elevator maker and marks one of Europe's biggest takeovers in recent years.
summary_public: The combination would create the world’s largest elevator maker and marks one of Europe's biggest takeovers in recent years.
